---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or merge strategy
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: LaurenceA4L
---

**What's currently missing or broken**
Describe what dts-merge doesn't do today that you need.

**What you'd expect it to do**
Describe the desired behaviour. Example input/output DTS snippets are very helpful.

**Workaround (if any)**
What you're doing now to work around the limitation.

**Additional context**
Links to relevant kernel DTS binding docs or example files.
